chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 142 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.811/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.812/2020. 03.10.2025 Mr. Fahad Hussain, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel, under instructions, does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
